entity.summary: Australian cryptocurrency trading platform and broker established in Brisbane in 2018, which announced a proposed merger with investment platform Superhero in June 2022 before the parties abandoned the plan in December 2022.
entity.notes: Swyftx's May 2022 submission to the Australian Treasury describes the business as an Australian-born cryptocurrency trading platform established in 2018 and explicitly characterizes its business model as a broker rather than an exchange. HEI retains the existing cex type under the current exchange-like platform scope.

expected.summary: Australia-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Swyftx brand.

changes.summary: Australian cryptocurrency trading platform and broker established in Brisbane in 2018, which announced a proposed merger with investment platform Superhero in June 2022 before the parties abandoned the plan in December 2022.
changes.notes: Swyftx's May 2022 submission to the Australian Treasury describes the business as an Australian-born cryptocurrency trading platform established in 2018 and explicitly characterizes its business model as a broker rather than an exchange. HEI retains the existing cex type under the current exchange-like platform scope.

events.title: Swyftx was established in Brisbane in 2018
events.description: Swyftx was established in 2018 as an Australian cryptocurrency trading platform and broker headquartered in Brisbane.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish the year but not an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: Swyftx and Superhero announced a proposed merger
events.description: Swyftx and Australian investment platform Superhero announced plans to combine into a financial-services group spanning digital assets and traditional investments.
events.notes: This records the announced transaction, not a completed terminal merger; the plan was later abandoned.

events.title: Swyftx and Superhero abandoned their merger plan
events.description: Swyftx and Superhero ended the proposed merger and continued as separate businesses.
events.notes: The event reverses the June 2022 proposed-merger announcement and does not change Swyftx's active status.

evidence.title: Swyftx submission on crypto-asset secondary service providers
evidence.notes: Swyftx's published Treasury submission identifies the Brisbane platform as established in 2018 and explains its broker business model.

evidence.title: Swyftx AI information
evidence.notes: Official company information identifies Swyftx Pty Ltd and the 2018 foundation year.

evidence.title: Swyftx and Superhero merge to create financial superapp
evidence.notes: Official announcement describes the proposed combination with Superhero.

evidence.title: Crypto exchange Swyftx and trading app Superhero announce $1.5 billion merger
evidence.notes: Independent contemporary report corroborates the June 8, 2022 announcement.

evidence.title: Australian Crypto Exchange Swyftx, Share Trading Platform Superhero Abandon Merger Plan
evidence.notes: Independent report documents the abandonment of the proposed merger.

evidence.title: Superhero and Swyftx's $1.5 billion merger falls apart
evidence.notes: Independent Australian business report corroborates the December 2022 termination.

evidence.title: Swyftx official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Swyftx identity and active trading platform.
